mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_book (user_id, subject_id, wrong_count, last_wrong_time, created_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{wrongCount}, #{lastWrongTime}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wrong_book WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND subject_id = #{subjectId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM wrong_book WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_wrong_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_book WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_book SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
